summary: IDE Workspace Visual Rebuild - All 11 features verified. Dark theme IDE shell loads correctly at /project/proj-demo-1 with professional VS Code/Cursor aesthetic. Three-column layout with resizable panels working. All components present: Header with App/Code tabs + Deploy button, Left AI Feed panel with file cards + todo panel + prompt composer, Activity bar with 7 icons, Explorer with file tree + OUTLINE/TIMELINE sections, Monaco editor (opens on file click), Terminal dock (expandable), Status bar with git branch.

minor.issue: 401 errors shown in console (expected - no auth for visual testing)
minor.note: Not a bug - this is a UI-only test with mock data

critical_code_review_comments: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes as required
CSS variables properly define dark theme colors for consistent styling
react-resizable-panels correctly implements drag handles between panels
Monaco Editor loads with vs-dark theme and proper syntax highlighting
File tree correctly shows expanded src folder with engine/world/player/vehicles subfolders
test_credentials: No auth required - visual testing with mock data at /project/proj-demo-1
seed_data_creation: Using hardcoded mock data in IDEWorkspace.tsx, AIFeedPanel.tsx, EditorCanvas.tsx
context_for_next_testing_agent: IDE workspace visual rebuild is complete and working. All components render correctly with dark theme. File tree navigation opens files in Monaco editor. Terminal dock expands/collapses. Status bar shows git branch. Resize handles work between panels.

terminal_dock.terminal_content: npm run dev, VITE v5.0.0 ready

mocked_data_note: MOCKED: File tree data hardcoded in IDEWorkspace.tsx, AI feed content hardcoded in AIFeedPanel.tsx, File contents hardcoded in EditorCanvas.tsx. No backend API calls for this visual rebuild.
